FROM THE FIELD
"Quality is in the framing. Invisible. Permanent.
Skip the rough-in shortcuts and you'll feel it in 5 years — drywall cracks, sticking doors, settling floors. The frame is what stays.
—MIKE · OPC FOUNDER
Oak Park Construction LIC · CBC1263425
